fieldValues.value:
Namespaces are dot-separated identifiers using lowercase alphanumeric characters and hyphens.

```
<component>[.<component>]*

component = [a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*
```

Examples:
```
core
community.adr
com.acme.hr
org.cooperative-name
```

sourceRefs.note: Subsection 02-1 from srs-spec.md - coarse source anchoring during migration
